details.IncidentDetail: "[56] COURT PROBATION OO COCO SO EXP 05/28/27 DOCKET# 02-23-01958 PC 273.5A MISDEMEANOR FULL SEARCH (PERSON,VEH,R,AREA TO SEARCH FOR WEAPONS) OBEY ALL LAWS, SHALL NO COMMIT ANY CRIMINAL OFFENSES, REFUSE BAC TEST OR DRIVE VEH W/ALCOHOL IN BLOOD // CASE W/INTERIM CONDITIONS UNTIL HEARING ON 06/01/26 DOCKET# 02-26-00826 3 FEL CHRGS PC 459, VC 10851A, PC 496D(A) DO NOT USE OR POSSESS ANY DANGEROUS DRUGS W/OUT PRESCRIPTION, SUBMIT TO NARCOTICS/ALCOHOL TESTING AT REQ OF ANY LE OFCR"
